shared_entrypoint_results.purpose: Measures backend-neutral public compiler entrypoints once per query.

backend_entrypoint_results.purpose: Measures backend-dependent public compiler entrypoints once per SQL backend.
backend_entrypoint_results.comparison_axis: end-to-end public API SQL target behavior

backend_lowering_results.purpose: Measures shared IR binding, lowering, and rendering cost per SQL backend below the public API layer.
